column1: # Single source of truth for per-hook descriptions shown in the Code Quality
# timing comment. Both precommit-timing-table.sh (ran hooks) and
# precommit-skipped-table.sh (skipped hooks) read this so the two tables agree.
# Format: <keyword>\t<description>. The keyword is matched as a substring of the
# hook display name; order matters — most specific first (some names share
# substrings, e.g. "ruff-format" before "ruff"). Lines starting with # ignored.

column2: Ensure files end in a newline
